about_item: 🐾BETTER CHOICE FOR YOUR PET LOVER: Siwa Marry 2 in 1 covered pet bed comes with an attached blanket hood a donut shape, providing ultra cozy, warmth and security insulating burrowing nest for your dogs and cats, for calming, anti-Anxiety, better sleep, better health

🐾ULTRA SOFT MATERIAL SAFETY : The interior sleep surface is lined with covered in ultra soft short plush fabric, Deep fill high resilience pp cotton. And the exterior features corn kernel shaped grey plush fabric, it's look like cute and fashion. They are gentle smell to the nose, good protection to the paws. It will comfortable for your pet sleepping and rest. Suitable for all seasons for your pet snugger on our dog bed. Vacuum packaging to eliminate pollution,allergens

🐾NON-SLIP BASE: For your pet's safety, Siwa Mary dog bed comes equipped with non-skid silicone dotting for the bottom to keep it from moving on non-carpeted place. It's also a little water-proof. When the bottom is a little wet, you can dry it with a towel

🐾CHOOSE SUITABLE SIZE: Two size to choose. 23/26 inch pet bed recommended for perfect for small and medium-sized dogs/cats of any age no more than 25/30lbs. Please measure your pet's size and weight before buying to avoid inappropriate. Note: NOT SUITABLE for pets with excessive teething or destructive chewing behavior

🐾EASY CARE: For your convenience, dog bed is machine washable in cold water, then tumble dry low or air dry. but If you want to use dog bed for a longer life, we usually recommend hand washing. if u have any question with Siwa Mary dog bed, please contact us, we will do our best to solve your Problem

summary.text: Customers find the pet bed soft, fluffy, and comfortable, particularly noting it's perfect for dogs who burrow. The bed is easy to wash and customers report their pets love sleeping in it, with one mentioning they sleep better when it's dark. While some customers find it durable with no rips or tears, others report it won't last long. The size receives mixed feedback, with some finding it perfect while others say it's too small.

authors_reviews.title: Perfect size for Boston terrier
authors_reviews.text: He loves it! Took him a few days to figure it out. Very soft and excellent quality. It came inside out. The non slip was on the inside. Easily flipped around.
authors_reviews.author: Steve S

authors_reviews.title: Soft and cozy
authors_reviews.text: This medium bed is perfect for my 40-pound fur baby who loves to burrow and snuggle into tight spaces. The bed is incredibly soft and high quality. If your dog is a similar size but prefers more room to stretch out, I’d recommend sizing up to a large.
authors_reviews.author: JulieAnne

authors_reviews.title: Very nice
authors_reviews.text: I bought it for a neighbor's dog it's a really beautiful bed and it has plenty of cushion on the bottom but I think the blanket part is sewn over too much but I would imagine you could get a seam splitter and take some of that out.
authors_reviews.author: Skeptic

authors_reviews.title: Dog bed
authors_reviews.text: We bought 2 of these for 2 different dogs and they love them... Mine curled up inside of it and was nice and warm..
authors_reviews.author: Sam hails

authors_reviews.title: Floppy fabric on top
authors_reviews.text: Soft, cozy but the blanket on top is so soft that it lies flat on the cushion and my 10lb Yorkie mix won’t burrow under it. He does like to curl up on top of it.
authors_reviews.author: CG

authors_reviews.title: Perfect bed
authors_reviews.text: Love this for my mini doxie.
authors_reviews.author: Stacey Roylance

authors_reviews.title: More please!
authors_reviews.text: Fluffy, snuggles and washes very easily. I've washed and dried a few times and it holds up very well!
authors_reviews.author: JB

authors_reviews.title: My dog loves it!
authors_reviews.text: Super soft! I barely got the packaging off and my dog was crawling inside and before I also had the chance to flip it inside out like the instructions say! Hands down best purchase for my dog. Def would recommend.
authors_reviews.author: Tiffany

other_countries_reviews.title: Fantastic Bed
other_countries_reviews.text: This dog bed arrived quickly and was absolutely perfect for my dachshund pup. Very fluffy and warm. Size was perfect. I got a small and my dog is 10lbs. Definitely recommend.
other_countries_reviews.author: Sarah

other_countries_reviews.title: buena calidad
other_countries_reviews.text: llegó perfecto, a mi perrito le encanta, se lava perfecto en lavadora
other_countries_reviews.author: Alejandra

other_countries_reviews.title: Parece bien
other_countries_reviews.text: Conseguí la talla M para mis perritas mestizas de tamaño chico, no se por qué estaban más económicas en esta talla que en la S. Hasta ahora van bien, no han usado la cobija.Algo a considerar: la base no parece ortopédica, simplemente es relleno. Me preocupa el tamaño y la calidad al lavarla a máquina… me hubiera gustado que tuviera cierre para una práctica limpieza.
other_countries_reviews.author: Majo Sjb

other_countries_reviews.title: My Dog Thinks Its Great
other_countries_reviews.text: This arrived vacuum-sealed, so when you pull it out, it's completely flat. The instructions for "fluffing" it up are included, so it's important to follow them to be sure it gets ready properly. I followed the instructions, but didn't want to wait 24 hours to let it sit out more, so I threw it in the dryer on air dry only for a while to help it along, and it worked great.My dog loves being under covers, so I expected her to adore this right away, however, she absolutely avoided it for about a week. Just when I was ready to call it quits, she did start lying on top of it, but did not want to be under the cover, so I figured it at least it was being used and left it be. After a few weeks, however, she decided it was the best dog bed around, and it is now her favorite place to be (other than my lap, haha). She grabs the edge of the cover and twirls herself around to get snuggled underneath. It's quite the production. All that to say, if your dog doesn't take to it immediately, give it some time and they may change their mind!My only "complaint" is that it has flattened pretty significantly over the last while. She is only just under 8 pounds, so certainly not heavy. She still loves it, but unfortunately, the stuffing inside does not hold its shape. When I decide to replace this one, I will likely look for one that has foam instead of the stuffing this does. But I have zero regrets for this purchase. For the price, it's great and will get enough use to have warranted the purchase.
other_countries_reviews.author: Megan

other_countries_reviews.title: Cozy day bed
other_countries_reviews.text: My wiener dog loves her new bed and I love the attached blanket. It cleans up the mess around her bed and is easy to clean.
other_countries_reviews.author: Cindy stranges
